_comment: Personal brand intro — 45-60s. Who I am → What I do → Proof → How to work with me. For hire pages, LinkedIn, podcast intros, About sections. Use ambient/cinematic music, calm narrative voice. Often the subject (Kevin or client) provides their own VO recording — if so, set voice.voice_id to null and use vo_audio fields pointing to real recordings.

scenes.prompt: Cinematic dawn light through office windows, soft golden hour, slow camera drift across a clean workspace — keyboard, plant, coffee mug. Calm, intentional, no people. No text or logos.

scenes.vo: I'm PERSON_NAME. For SEVERAL_YEARS years, I've helped TARGET_AUDIENCE solve PROBLEM_AREA.

scenes.prompt: Slow camera push-in on the person working at their desk. Natural lighting, focused expression, subtle motion of hands. Documentary realism, calm intensity.
scenes.vo: I do MY_CRAFT_DESCRIPTION — and I do it with FEW_KEY_VALUES.

scenes.prompt: Abstract cinematic visual matching brand mood — could be city skyline at blue hour, sailboat on calm water, mountain ridge at dawn — whatever metaphor fits the brand. No text or logos.

scenes.headline: Let's work together
scenes.vo: Visit PERSON dot com slash hire to start a conversation.
